source: tests/testthat/test-docx-to-qmd.R:2396-2397 (payload construction in build_figure_field_code_docx(), starting at :2396: payload_fields <- list(type = "figure", id = fig_id, version = 2L); :2397: if (!is.null(original_path)) payload_fields$original_path <- original_path) with the literal argument values from :2480-2485 (test 'figure field code restores original_path on re-harvest (#79)': :2480 orig <- "figures/fig-consort-flow.png"; :2482 fig_id = "fig-consort-flow"; :2485 original_path = orig), combined verbatim -- the legacy writer's v2 figure field-code shape.
